channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Medvedev ends Alcaraz’s winning run, sets up Sinner final at Indian Wells
item.description: Medvedev, who arrived in the US after leaving the UAE via Oman amid Iranian attacks. ends the world no 1's 16-match run.

item.title: Cars were burned and overturned by shrapnel in Tel Aviv district
item.description: Cars were seen burned and one overturned in in Tel Aviv district caused by shrapnel after a wave of Iranian missiles.

item.title: FPV drone slams into US military base in Iraq
item.description: Iraq's Iranian-backed Kataib Hezbollah has released drone video from an attack on the US's Victory Base in Baghdad.

item.title: Funeral procession for influential Iranian defence chief
item.description: Iran has held a funeral for the country's most influential defence figure, Ali Shamkhani.

item.title: Barrage of US-Israeli strikes target Isfahan
item.description: A US-Israeli strike on a factory in Isfahan has killed least 15 people, according to Iranian media.

item.title: Former CIA chief reveals early knowledge of Israeli attack plans
item.description: Former CIA chief David Petraeus says the US attacked Iran to scuttle its ability to defend itself against Israel.

item.title: Iran’s Space Research Centre severely damaged in strikes
item.description: Video has revealed the Iranian Space Research Centre in Tehran has suffered significant damage from Israeli-US strikes.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump says not ready for deal; US, Israel pound Isfahan
item.description: US President Donald Trump says allies who rely on Gulf oil must help to keep the Strait of Hormuz open.

item.title: Pakistan strikes Afghan base after its president warns ‘red line’ crossed
item.description: Islamabad hits Kandahar facility after Taliban drones strike civilian areas and military sites as conflict intensifies.

item.title: Bahrain and Saudi Arabia F1 race cancellations confirmed due to Iran war
item.description: Bahrain and Saudi Arabia's Formula One Grands Prix races will not be held in April on safety grounds due to the war.
